name: vts-local-orchestrator
description: Delegate cheap code-location to ANY local LLM (Ollama, full-GPU) that drives vs-token-safer's vs-search tools — so Claude spends its tokens on reasoning, not raw search output. Model-agnostic (default gemma4:e4b). Ships the qvts CLI, a live web dashboard with a 3-way token-savings panel, and an auto-loading delegation-routing skill.
